headline: GRAINGER'S SHAREHOLDERS ELECT 12 DIRECTORS AND OTHER ANNUAL MEETING HIGHLIGHTS
summary: W.W. Grainger, Inc. (NYSE: GWW) held its annual meeting of shareholders virtually today. Chairman and CEO D.G. Macpherson provided a company update, which included 2025 financial and operational highlights.

raw.headline: GRAINGER'S SHAREHOLDERS ELECT 12 DIRECTORS AND OTHER ANNUAL MEETING HIGHLIGHTS

headline: GRAINGER INCREASES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND BY 10%
summary: W.W. Grainger, Inc. (NYSE: GWW) announced today that its board of directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $2.49 per share, an increase of 10% from the most recent company dividend. The dividend is payable on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record on May 11, 2026.

headline: SiteOne Landscape (SITE) Reports Q1 Loss, Lags Revenue Estimates
summary: SiteOne Landscape (SITE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -33.33% and -5.18%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
